subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I humbly beseech Thee to establish this servant of Thine as a guardian of the realms and a refuge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انی اتضرع الیک ان تجعل عبدک هذا قواما للممالک و ملاذا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
